title: Butler Manager (ID: 690623)
description:
Brief Summary:
Join a dynamic team as a Butler Manager, where your organizational skills will play a crucial role in managing a busy household effectively. This position offers an exciting opportunity to showcase your event planning and interpersonal skills.

Responsibilities:

  • Oversee and manage the household schedule and calendar for senior executives.

  • Plan, organize, and coordinate events with precision.

  • Arrange appointments to cater to both personal and professional needs.

  • Schedule and supervise maintenance and repair work for home projects.

  • Handle household bills and perform essential administrative tasks.

  • Execute errands and manage necessary day-to-day activities.

  • Supervise household staff, including housekeepers, private chefs, caregivers, and drivers.

  • Manage household resources, including manpower schedules and inventory.

  • Provide essential support for business trips, including flight arrangements and local logistics.

  • Develop and maintain household management standards, such as SOPs, equipment manuals, inventory lists, and daily checklists.

Requirements:

  • Relevant working experience in a similar capacity.

  • Strong communication skills to understand and adapt to the family’s preferences.

  • Knowledgeable in various areas pertinent to household management.

  • Highly responsible, efficient, discreet, and well-organized.

  • Excellent judgment, attention to detail, and ability to manage confidential information.

  • Butler certification is a desirable asset.

  • Proficient in Microsoft Office and document management.

Interested candidates who wish to apply for the advertised position, please click on “Apply Now”. We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

EA License No: 01C4394 (PERSOL Singapore Pte Ltd)

You acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree with the Privacy Policy.

postedCompany.description:
PERSOL is Asia-Pacific’s leading Staffing and HR solutions partner, operating across 13 markets with deep local insight and regional scale. With more than 80 offices and decades of experience, we deliver integrated workforce solutions that are tailored, tech-enabled, and designed for the dynamic world of work.

We combine human expertise with smart technology to help organisations solve workforce challenges, unlock potential, and stay ahead of change. From recruitment and talent management to workforce strategy and advisory, our collaborative approach puts your goals at the centre.

In 2025, we came together under the PERSOL name — reflecting our bold vision for the future of work and our Group’s Vision: Work and Smile.

Whether you’re building teams, growing careers, or transforming how work gets done, we’re here.
